Yeah, we would, we would have
to consult on how they manage that.
Um, obviously at the moment they do have processes
to enable the jps to observe that process.
Um, but I, yeah, I, with, without having worked
through actually what's involved
and with people who are responsible for the operations,
it couldn't give you a confident answer that,
That there'll be a review of the local body election.
There always is. Um, there would justice committee do it?
That'd be a good question. But then actually that process.
Alright, well look, um, looks like no more questions.
So thank you very much. Thank, very helpful.
Can't think of anyone else.
